controls.name: stage147_canonical_bundle_present
controls.description: Stage147 canonical manifest bundle must remain present and passing.

controls.name: node1_full_contract_access_defined
controls.description: Node1 must retain full-contract access for planning authority.

controls.name: node2_surface_only_defined
controls.description: Node2 must never receive full-contract or raw reveal payloads.

controls.name: node3_critic_scope_defined
controls.description: Node3 must receive structured critic summaries instead of mutation authority.

controls.name: reveal_surface_projection_preserved
controls.description: RevealState must keep hidden visibility and expose a non-empty Node2 surface projection only.

controls.name: projection_registry_blocks_hidden_fields
controls.description: Surface projection registry must name blocked fields for every packet.

controls.name: route_modules_exist
controls.description: Referenced node modules must exist in the repository.

controls.name: provider_zero_and_write_zero_preserved
controls.description: Stage148 must preserve provider-zero and write-zero invariants.
